context:
{
  "description": "AI-powered project management tool that bridges Jira with natural language. Allows teams to create, update, and query Jira tickets via conversational AI, and generates automated sprint reports.",
  "current_state": "Jira API integration complete. Basic ticket creation and query via chat working. Sprint report generation in alpha. No webhook support yet.",
  "known_issues": [
    "No webhook support \u2014 relies on polling (slow updates)",
    "Sprint report format not configurable",
    "Slack integration limited to read-only",
    "No support for Jira Service Management (only Software)",
    "AI recommendations lack historical context"
  ],
  "next_priorities": [
    "Webhook integration for real-time updates",
    "Configurable sprint report templates",
    "Slack write integration (create tickets from Slack)",
    "Historical velocity data ingestion for better forecasts",
    "Jira Service Management support"
  ]
}
